title: Zephyr: Kconfig for multi-channel, extend LoRa driver and link layer
description: Implement da2q.2 for Zephyr: add CONFIG_LICHEN_MULTI_CHANNEL_ENABLED and N_CHANNELS. Extend lichen_lora API with channel param, add coordination/scheduler in link/lora_l2.c using announce rx_channel and synchronized_hop. Update init, tests, T1000E config.
